videos.title: Ghost caught on camera in daylight on a Scottish river.
videos.description:
Whilst filming for otters in a Scottish river the photographer noticed something very strange when playing the video back.

In this 3 minute clip you can see there is something unusual happening in the trees.

videos.title: City of Lakes Loppet Winter Festival Makes Changes Amid Pandemic
videos.description: The City of Lakes Loppet Winter Festival is normally a three-day event, but this year it's being split into two weekends (1:38). WCCO 4 News At 6 - January 30, 2021
videos.transcript:
minnesotans are enjoying some winter fun
as the twin cities tradition gets into
full swing
the city of lake slope winter festival
is normally a three-day event
but this year it's being split into two
weekends this is the first one
and the festival started as a single
cross-country skiing race but it's grown
into several races over the years
we stopped by theo worth park today to
meet some racers including a mom
and her seven-year-old daughter who are
participating for the first time
it's exciting to be part of a
competition
you know as a you know rachel as a
seven-year-old and me
as a 40-something-year-old don't
normally
do like outdoor winter competitions and
so it's exciting to be able to do one
and even though we'll probably come in
last it's pretty exciting
it's good to try there are coven 19
protocols in place to keep everyone
safe they go beyond masking and social
distancing
they are also giving racers individual
start times
most of our events have been in the past
they are
mass start events whereas this year
everyone gets their own start time
and then there's also the option for
people to do virtual
hybrid or in-person events so if people
don't want to come here and they don't
feel comfortable
being at the park then people can sign
up and do their event completely online
or we'll leave the course open for
everybody for the week in between the
two weekends and
we'll have the courses marked and people
can come out and ski the course on their
own time
for a full list of lope and festival
events just head to wcco.com
links

videos.title: Young Skiers Learn The Slopes At Minne-Loppet
videos.description: For many families, learning to ski is a rite of passage, Liz Collin reports (1:07). WCCO 4 News At 10 – Jan. 27, 2018
videos.transcript:
here in Minnesota we love our snow
sports this time of year and for many
families learning to ski is a rite of
passage it is one of the largest Nordic
Ski events in North America and it's
right in the middle of the city of
Minneapolis I think that when people
think of adventure and they think of
getting outdoors they think of the
Boundary Waters or they think of
something but I don't believe is that
you can have adventure anywhere in the
city yeah today many kids took part in
that adventure at the lopat foundation
held its mini lopat ski race today at
Lake Calhoun the event focuses on young
skiers just learning the sport and that
means for some it was a little slow
going can't it it it
it falling then I got up I helped to
give me up it was like really good
seeing people all work together and
stuff the people that was participating
I think they did a good job you look
like you're deserving of a medal there
we go congratulations
how cute are they and yeah Minneapolis
Mayor jacob frye was also at the event
to cheer on participants as they crossed
the finish line

videos.title: Crescent Vintage Race Crash
videos.description: Me getting crashed at the NVSRS Crescent Lake Race in Rhinelander, WI, (03/08/08).  The sled ended up to be okay.  I took 3rd in the '75 & older single cylinder final.
